map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh how nice, you came all the way here just to lose!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Martial-type? No, I don't think that's a thing.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: If not supposed to eat battery, why battery taste good?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Don't think about the lore implications of this area, okay?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I can't find my nose, *you* must have it, thief!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh how nice, you came all the way here just to lose!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Every time you run away from a battle I get a little closer.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This is *not* what I signed up for.
